personal.preferred_title: Senior SQL / ETL Data Engineer | Production Support | AI-Assisted Automation

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience spanning SQL, PL/SQL, Python automation, ETL pipelines, database reliability, production support, reporting, and regulated financial-services data environments. Strong background building and maintaining operational data pipelines, troubleshooting production issues, designing database/reporting structures, and using automation to improve reliability and reduce manual effort. Experienced with AI-assisted development workflows and cloud data platforms, with strongest production depth in Oracle, Python, AWS data services, and enterprise reporting.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained production data pipelines using Python, SQL, Pandas, and Oracle-backed reporting structures to support operational analytics, capacity forecasting, and executive reporting.
Designed optimized database schemas, historical retention structures, and reporting datasets used to analyze telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints.
Developed automation for data loading, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, operational reporting, and recurring production support workflows.
Troubleshot data quality, reporting, and pipeline issues by tracing source feeds, transformation logic, database behavior, and downstream reporting expectations.
Integrated monitoring and operational datasets from TrueSight, CA APM, AppDynamics, and related platforms into unified reporting layers for engineering and leadership stakeholders.
Built cloud-aligned data workflows using AWS S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and IAM concepts to support scalable analytics and forecasting workloads.
Used AI-assisted development tools and LLM workflows to accelerate Python development, documentation, quality checks, and repeatable job-search/data automation pipelines.
Created runbooks, technical documentation, validation notes, and operational reporting processes to improve supportability and handoff across teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving data correctness and query performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to compare source and target data across millions of transaction records during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, transaction-processing logic, and database migration routines to maintain sub-second query expectations.
Automated schema conversion, validation, and migration-support processes to reduce manual effort and improve production cutover reliability.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven reporting scripts that automated performance data extraction and replaced manual weekly reporting workflows.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, operational reports, and documentation standards for enterprise application monitoring environments.
Supported production troubleshooting across application, middleware, and database-adjacent performance issues in regulated enterprise environments.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing interfaces and reporting workflows using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, COBOL exposure, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux environments.
Maintained production billing, invoicing, settlement, and reporting components with attention to data accuracy, operational reliability, and performance.
Improved billing process performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, and throughput-focused code changes.
Created and maintained technical documentation, interface notes, and support processes for legacy enterprise systems.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.SQL & Databases: SQL, PL/SQL, Oracle, Oracle RAC, stored procedure concepts, schema design, indexing/partitioning concepts, query tuning, database objects, reporting tables, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DB2 concepts
skills.ETL & Data Operations: ETL/ELT pipelines, data loading, data validation, reconciliation, cleansing, operational reporting, job monitoring, exception handling, runbooks, production support, data quality checks
skills.Automation & Programming: Python, Pandas, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, C, C++, Java, XML, JSON, YAML, AI-assisted development with Claude Code/Codex/Copilot-style workflows
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts; Azure/AWS/GCP concepts; SQL Server and SSIS transferable concepts
skills.Reliability & Governance: Monitoring, logging, alerting, root-cause analysis, regulated data controls, access-control awareness, auditability, documentation, data privacy and security awareness
skills.Delivery: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, technical documentation, stakeholder support, production incident triage, cross-functional collaboration
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Microsoft SQL Server concepts, SSIS concepts, .NET legacy exposure, Terraform beginner, Azure Data Factory concepts, GitHub Copilot and Microsoft Copilot-style AI tooling

projects.name: AI-Assisted Job Search and Document Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based automation workflow that uses LLMs, JSON artifacts, validation gates, semantic duplicate checks, and repeatable rendering steps to support high-volume job application preparation and tracking.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented patterns for curated analytics, query optimization, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Pipeline
projects.description: Built a forecasting and analytics pipeline that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets for capacity risk analysis, dashboarding, and stakeholder reporting.
